parity_goal: Preserve a standalone best-effort cross-app context sweep that writes deduped timestamp-true daily-note log entries and advances checkpoints per source only after successful writes.
behavior_signature_before: Private skill gathered Superhuman, Slack, Notion, CRM, and local Codex context into a private daily note with per-source checkpoints.
behavior_signature_after: Public skill keeps the same gathering, classification, deterministic write, dedupe, and checkpoint behavior while using portable journal and runtime paths.

expected_output_shape: best-effort Superhuman Slack Notion CRM Codex sweep
direct write into the configured daily note log
override lower bound applied to this run
honest best-effort limits for Notion and CRM
